nasb.text: Do not say, “Why is it that the former days were better than these?” For it is not from wisdom that you ask about this.

esv.text: Say not, “Why were the former days better than these?” For it is not from wisdom that you ask this.

cnv.text: 你不要說：“為甚麼從前的日子勝過現在的呢？” 你這樣問，不是出於智慧。

ccb.text: 不要问为什么过去比现在好， 因为这样问不明智。

csbs.text: 不要说：“为什么先前的日子好过现在的日子呢？” 因为你这样问不是出于智慧。
